items.name: ⛄😇Snow angel
items.description:
Built for the day-ones, wanted by rare hunters, and a score for traders—this drop is pure ❄️✨

Whether you’re stacking your inventory, showing off your icy vibes, or flipping for max profit, the ⛄ Snow angle emote brings a cool twist to any fit. Limited, crisp, and ready to melt the competition.

🌟 Only 500 ever made
💎 Collector-grade rarity
